description_long: This object consists of three modern military jet airplanes flying in close formation, each with distinct color schemes and swept-back wings. The jets feature streamlined fuselages, sharply angled tails, and prominent air intakes, suggesting high-speed performance. Contrails extend behind each aircraft, emphasizing their rapid movement through the air. The wings are swept and positioned low on the fuselage, with no visible winglets. The cockpits are enclosed and located at the front of each jet, with canopies blending smoothly into the fuselage. The overall appearance is sleek, with metallic and camouflaged surfaces, and the jets are equipped with twin vertical stabilizers and conventional tails.
description: Three modern military jet airplanes in close formation, featuring swept-back wings, twin vertical stabilizers, and streamlined, camouflaged fuselages.
description_view_0: Side view showing the three jets in formation, highlighting their swept-back wings, streamlined bodies, and trailing contrails.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the nose profiles, cockpit canopies, and the relative spacing between the three jets.
description_view_2: Opposite side view emphasizing the different color schemes and the aerodynamic shapes of the jets' fuselages and tails.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the twin vertical stabilizers, engine exhausts, and the alignment of the jets in flight.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing, swept-back configuration with no visible winglets or dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: Twin jet engines integrated into the rear fuselage of each airplane.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with twin vertical stabilizers and horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Retractable tricycle landing gear, not visible in flight configuration.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed single-seat cockpits with streamlined canopies.
